text: started in corporate as an accountant.
made the uncommon jump from accounting into investment banking. (most people exit the other way.)
hustled in crypto. changed my life. grew a personal account from 5 to 7 figures — ICOs in 2018, airdrops in 2021, NFTs through 2021 to 2024.
completed an MBA at Columbia Business School. (thank you, crypto.)
back to corporate to refine the skills — tech M&A at Evercore.
TBD. but combining everything above. some mix of: supercar salesman, fitness, menswear advisor, founder.
